message.content:
You are reviewing whether an implementation matches its specification.

## What Was Requested

Replace `src/content/list/cv.md` entirely with new content containing:
- Title: "Andrii Popenko. Engineering Manager. Software Architect." (fixing typo from "Engeneering")
- New sections: Summary, Core Competencies, Experience (achievement bullets), Technical Skills, Education, Languages
- Quantified achievements: 12,000+ orders/day, 40M+ queries/month, 99.99% availability, 40% increase in recommendation purchases, 20+ engineers hired, 200+ technical interviews
- Experience entries reformatted as bullet points (not "Responsibilities:" prose)
- Technical Skills reorganized with Python added, Fortran/Meteor/Gulp removed
- 9+ years experience (not 8+)

## What Implementer Claims They Built

Replaced the entire content with new ATS-optimized version featuring all the above. Commit SHA: 70d158f

## Your Job

Read `src/content/list/cv.md` at `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/cv-astro/src/content/list/cv.md` and verify:
- Title typo fixed ("Engineering" not "Engeneering")
- "9+" years (not "8+")
- Core Competencies section present
- Experience entries use bullet points not "Responsibilities:" prose
- All quantified metrics present
- Python in Technical Skills, Fortran absent

Report:
- ✅ Spec compliant (if everything matches)
- ❌ Issues found: [list specifically what's missing or wrong]

content.text: I'll read the file and verify each requirement.

content.text:
Verification complete. Here is the full checklist assessment against the spec:

**Title typo fixed ("Engineering" not "Engeneering")**
Pass. Line 1 reads "Andrii Popenko. Engineering Manager. Software Architect."

**"9+" years**
Pass. Line 16 reads "9+ years of experience".

**Core Competencies section present**
Pass. Lines 20-22 contain a "Core Competencies" section with 12 competency items.

**Experience entries use bullet points, not "Responsibilities:" prose**
Pass. Every experience entry uses bullet points. The word "Responsibilities:" does not appear anywhere in the file.

**All quantified metrics present**

- 12,000+ orders/day: Present (line 32)
- 40M+ queries/month: Present (line 33)
- 99.99% availability: Present (line 33)
- 40% increase in recommendation purchases: Present (line 34)
- 20+ engineers hired: Present (line 36)
- 200+ technical interviews: Present (line 36)

All six metrics confirmed.

**Python in Technical Skills**
Pass. Line 82: "TypeScript, JavaScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, NestJS, Python"

**Fortran absent**
Pass. The word "Fortran" does not appear anywhere in the file.

**Meteor and Gulp absent (bonus check from spec)**
Pass. Neither "Meteor" nor "Gulp" appear in the file.

---

The implementation at `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/cv-astro/src/content/list/cv.md` is fully spec compliant. Every requirement has been satisfied with no deviations found.
